overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character walking through a bioluminescent alien jungle environment with floating mountains in the background. The character explores a lush ridge path during blue hour, passing exotic flora and other Na'vi characters near ancient stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien jungle ridge overlooking floating mountains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along grassy ridge with view of floating mountains

entered.detail: massive floating islands with waterfalls suspended in the sky
large pale moon visible in the blue sky
glowing orange flying creatures moving through the air
dense alien vegetation with large leaves

segments.scene_description: The Na'vi character walks along an open grassy ridge during blue hour, with massive floating mountains visible in the distance against a dark blue sky. Bioluminescent orange creatures fly through the air while lush jungle vegetation lines the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: ridge path with exotic spiral flora

events.description: large spiral-shaped vine structure comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along ridge path passing large spiral vine structures

entered.detail: massive twisted vine structure spiraling upward

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the ridge as the camera passes a massive spiral vine structure on the right. The floating mountains shift to the left side of the frame while the sky becomes partially obscured by overhead canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: settlement edge with bioluminescent flora and stone ruins

events.description: approaching Na'vi settlement with stone ruins and other characters

agents.ego_description: approaching group of Na'vi near glowing plants and stone structures

notable_agents.action: Na'vi standing near stone ruins observing the surroundings

entered.detail: large glowing purple and blue bioluminescent flora
ancient stone structures partially covered in vegetation
clusters of small white bioluminescent flowers

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a Na'vi settlement marked by ancient stone ruins and large bioluminescent purple plants. Other Na'vi characters are visible near the ruins as the path leads into a more populated area with glowing white flowers lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense jungle path through settlement with rock formations

agents.ego_description: walking uphill through dense vegetation past sitting and standing Na'vi

notable_agents.action: Na'vi sitting on the ground near the path

entered.detail: tall rock face with layered stone texture

segments.scene_description: The path narrows and ascends through dense jungle vegetation, passing Na'vi sitting and standing among the trees. Large rock cliffs rise on the right while glowing flowers illuminate the path, and the floating mountains disappear from view behind the thick canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a ridge that transitions from an open, airy vista into a dense, bioluminescent jungle settlement. It begins with a Na'vi character walking across a grassy ridge under a dark blue sky, where bioluminescent orange creatures drift past massive floating mountains in the distance. As the character progresses, the camera passes a massive spiral vine and the open horizon begins to close in, with the floating mountains shifting position as an overhead canopy starts to obscure the sky. The scene then opens into a settlement area marked by ancient stone ruins and glowing purple plants, where other Na'vi gather among paths lined with luminous white flowers. Finally, the route narrows and ascends through thick vegetation and towering rock cliffs, with the floating mountains disappearing entirely behind the dense, glowing foliage of the deep jungle.
